headline: Delta and Other Airline Stocks Are Under Pressure After a Sector-Wide Profit Warning
summary: Rising oil prices and a sector-wide profit warning had hit the stocks hard in premarket trading but they quickly fought back after Iran said it has ended its strikes toward Israel.  Delta Air Lines  was down 0.7% in early trading, while  United Airlines  was down 1.4% after initially falling close to 3% before the open.  When it comes to airlines, investors are digesting a warning from the International Air Transport Association.

headline: Why Delta and Other Airline Stocks Are Shrugging Off a Sector-Wide Profit Warning
summary: Rising oil prices and a sector-wide profit warning had hit the stocks initially but they quickly fought back after Iran said it has ended its strikes toward Israel.  Delta Air Lines  was up 0.4% ahead of the open, while  United Airlines  was down just 0.5% after initially falling close to 3%.  When it comes to airlines, investors are digesting a warning from the International Air Transport Association.
